description: Recent (2024–2026) Addis Ababa developer projects compiled for EthioMLS import. Linked to data/developers/addis-developers.json via registrationNumber (ET-DIR-*). Not an official registry extract.

description.en: Fully gated ~30,000+ sqm mixed-use compound in Bole Bulbula (Kangaroo Developments). Includes under-construction G+4 modern apartments (1 unit/floor, 2–3BR), completed G+8 mixed-use (studio–3BR + retail), and completed G+1 luxury villas (4BR + master). Amenities: concierge, gym, kids play, movie theater, rooftop lounge, sauna, yoga, overnight security, basement parking. Contact +251 941 000 888 · https://kangaroodevelopments.com

description.en: NOW SELLING — under construction at Tracon’s Jemo 1 estate (~5 ha / 50,000 sqm compound with Seven Courtyards & Hill Side). High-ceiling 3–5 bedroom apartments with wide corridors and balconies. Estate amenities: 24h security CCTV, groundwater + 90,000L tanker, elevators, private gardens, extra parking, generator, park with pool/tennis/basketball; gym & spa planned. Contact +251 91 120 5011 · https://www.tracontrading.com/filedside.html
